description_long: This obelisk is a sculptural monument featuring two human figures integrated into its vertical structure. The lower figure is seated, draped in a robe with a bowed head, while the upper figure emerges from the obelisk's shaft, arms raised and hands gripping the top edge. The monument is crafted from a light-colored stone, giving it a solemn and dignified appearance. The base consists of a stepped platform, providing both elevation and a sense of grandeur. The rear of the obelisk is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the dramatic relief on the front. The overall design is both commemorative and artistic, blending human forms with architectural geometry.
description: A light stone obelisk with sculpted human figures, seated and standing, integrated into its front and set atop a stepped base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the seated and standing human figures in high relief, with detailed robes and expressive postures.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the seated figure and the vertical shaft, with the stepped base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the obelisk and the full rectangular shaft.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the figures and the stepped base, mirroring the left side.
attribute_ornamentation: The front face features detailed sculptural reliefs of two human figures, one seated and one standing, with draped clothing and expressive postures. No additional motifs or patterns are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular, stepped platform made of the same light stone as the obelisk, with three visible steps leading up to the main shaft. The surface is flat and unadorned, providing stability and prominence.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and squared off, with the hands of the upper figure gripping the top edge. There are no pointed or decorative elements at the tip.
